proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher inflammatory and tumor-burden markers `ldh_u_l`, `crp_mg_l`, `nlr`, and `weight_loss_pct_6mo` are associated with shorter mean `pfs_months`, while higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with longer mean `pfs_months` after adjustment for baseline clinical factors.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.041 months of PFS per 100 U/L higher ldh_u_l (p=<1e-300).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0.001 months of PFS per 10 mg/L higher crp_mg_l (p=0.7041).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.001 months of PFS per one-unit higher nlr (p=0.5826).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.365 months of PFS per 5 percentage-point higher weight_loss_pct_6mo (p=<1e-300).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0.454 months of PFS per 1 g/dL higher albumin_g_dl (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv`, `has_brain_mets`, `liver_mets`, or `bone_mets` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients without those metastatic burden features after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -1.418 months for stage_iv=1 vs 0 (p=<1e-300).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.917 months for has_brain_mets=1 vs 0 (p=<1e-300).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.006 months for liver_mets=1 vs 0 (p=0.5711).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.001 months for bone_mets=1 vs 0 (p=0.8915).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `egfr_mutation` have longer `pfs_months` specifically when treated with `treatment_osimertinib`; the `treatment_osimertinib` by `egfr_mutation` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated an additional -0.017 months for treatment_osimertinib among egfr_mutation=1 patients beyond the main effects (p=0.4745).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `kras_g12c` have longer `pfs_months` specifically when treated with `treatment_sotorasib`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `kras_g12c` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated an additional 2.535 months for treatment_sotorasib among kras_g12c=1 patients beyond the main effects (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca2_mutation` have longer `pfs_months` specifically when treated with `treatment_olaparib`; the `treatment_olaparib` by `brca2_mutation` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated an additional -0.004 months for treatment_olaparib among brca2_mutation=1 patients beyond the main effects (p=0.9271).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tmb_high` derive more `pfs_months` benefit from `treatment_pembrolizumab` than patients without `tmb_high`; the interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated an additional -0.014 months for treatment_pembrolizumab among tmb_high=1 patients beyond the main effects (p=0.3887).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `pdl1_tps` increases the `pfs_months` benefit associated with `treatment_pembrolizumab`; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `pdl1_tps` interaction per 50 TPS points is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated 0.008 additional months of pembrolizumab-associated PFS per 50-point higher pdl1_tps (p=0.9964).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stk11_mutation` derive less `pfs_months` benefit from `treatment_pembrolizumab`; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `stk11_mutation` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated -0.013 months for the treatment_pembrolizumab by stk11_mutation interaction (p=0.5149).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `egfr_mutation` reduces the `pfs_months` benefit associated with `treatment_pembrolizumab`; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `egfr_mutation` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated 0.021 months for the treatment_pembrolizumab by egfr_mutation interaction (p=0.3313).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `kras_g12c` reduces the `pfs_months` benefit associated with `treatment_pembrolizumab`; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `kras_g12c` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated -0.053 months for the treatment_pembrolizumab by kras_g12c interaction (p=0.0077).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `liver_mets` attenuates the `pfs_months` benefit associated with `treatment_pembrolizumab`; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `liver_mets` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated 0.006 months for the treatment_pembrolizumab by liver_mets interaction (p=0.7509).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `has_brain_mets` reduces the `pfs_months` benefit associated with `treatment_osimertinib`; the `treatment_osimertinib` by `has_brain_mets` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated 0.027 months for the treatment_osimertinib by has_brain_mets interaction (p=0.1296).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `alk_fusion`, `ros1_fusion`, `ret_fusion`, and `met_exon14_skipping` each have positive adjusted associations with `pfs_months`, reflecting actionable oncogene subgroups with longer disease control.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.023 months for alk_fusion=1 vs 0 (p=0.1634).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.006 months for ros1_fusion=1 vs 0 (p=0.8622).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.009 months for ret_fusion=1 vs 0 (p=0.7239).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0.015 months for met_exon14_skipping=1 vs 0 (p=0.4761).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `pleural_effusion`, `pericardial_effusion`, `adrenal_mets`, and `contralateral_lung_mets` are associated with shorter adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 0.005 months for pleural_effusion=1 vs 0 (p=0.6183).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.023 months for pericardial_effusion=1 vs 0 (p=0.2048).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0.003 months for adrenal_mets=1 vs 0 (p=0.7709).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.018 months for contralateral_lung_mets=1 vs 0 (p=0.0958).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `hemoglobin_g_dl` and `spo2_pct` are positively associated with `pfs_months`, while `alkaline_phosphatase_u_l` and `cea_ng_ml` are negatively associated with `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated 0.001 months per 1 g/dL higher hemoglobin_g_dl (p=0.5664).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0 months per 1 percentage-point higher spo2_pct (p=0.9396).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.005 months per 100 U/L higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l (p=0.4637).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.001 months per 10 ng/mL higher cea_ng_ml (p=0.8599).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Baseline comorbidity variables `chronic_kidney_disease`, `heart_failure`, `copd`, and `autoimmune_disease` are associated with shorter adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.005 months for chronic_kidney_disease=1 vs 0 (p=0.6768).
Adjusted OLS estimated -0.024 months for heart_failure=1 vs 0 (p=0.0445).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0 months for copd=1 vs 0 (p=0.9705).
Adjusted OLS estimated 0.015 months for autoimmune_disease=1 vs 0 (p=0.3802).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Apparent main effects of `treatment_pembrolizumab`, `treatment_sotorasib`, `treatment_olaparib`, and `treatment_osimertinib` on `pfs_months` are positive after baseline adjustment, before accounting for predictive biomarker interactions.

analyses.result_summary: Baseline-adjusted treatment main effect for treatment_pembrolizumab was -0.006 months (p=0.4288).
Baseline-adjusted treatment main effect for treatment_sotorasib was 0.324 months (p=<1e-300).
Baseline-adjusted treatment main effect for treatment_olaparib was 0.006 months (p=0.4790).
Baseline-adjusted treatment main effect for treatment_osimertinib was -0.003 months (p=0.7383).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After jointly including key treatment-biomarker interactions, only `treatment_sotorasib` by `kras_g12c` remains a large positive predictor of longer `pfs_months`, while `treatment_osimertinib` by `egfr_mutation`, `treatment_olaparib` by `brca2_mutation`, and `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `tmb_high` are near zero.

analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated -0.022 months for osimertinib by EGFR mutation (p=0.2120).
Joint interaction model estimated 2.535 months for sotorasib by KRAS G12C (p=<1e-300).
Joint interaction model estimated -0.035 months for olaparib by BRCA2 mutation (p=0.3280).
Joint interaction model estimated -0.001 months for pembrolizumab by TMB-high (p=0.9581).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `stk11_mutation` has at most a small negative modification of `treatment_pembrolizumab` benefit after accounting for `tmb_high` and other treatment-biomarker interactions.

analyses.result_summary: Joint interaction model estimated -0.003 months for pembrolizumab by STK11 mutation (p=0.8644).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The three-way `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `tmb_high` by `stk11_mutation` interaction is slightly negative but close to zero, indicating no clear TMB-high-specific STK11 attenuation.

analyses.result_summary: Three-way interaction model estimated -0.033 months for treatment_pembrolizumab by tmb_high by stk11_mutation (p=0.4628).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `histology` modifies `treatment_pembrolizumab` benefit, with squamous histology having a different `pfs_months` treatment association than non-squamous histology.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated -0.005 months for treatment_pembrolizumab by histology_squamous (p=0.7682).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `smoking_status` modifies `treatment_pembrolizumab` benefit, with current smokers having a different `pfs_months` treatment association than never/former smokers.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction model estimated 0.012 months for treatment_pembrolizumab by current smoking_status (p=0.4504).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A scan of binary covariates for `treatment_pembrolizumab` will show only small interaction effects on `pfs_months`, with the largest absolute interaction under 0.10 months.

analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab interaction scan: interstitial_lung_disease_history interaction was 0.094 months (p=0.0108).
Pembrolizumab interaction scan: met_exon14_skipping interaction was 0.076 months (p=0.0700).
Pembrolizumab interaction scan: kras_g12c interaction was -0.053 months (p=0.0077).
Pembrolizumab interaction scan: ret_fusion interaction was 0.039 months (p=0.4421).
Pembrolizumab interaction scan: diabetes_mellitus interaction was 0.038 months (p=0.0264).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A scan of binary covariates for `treatment_osimertinib` will not identify a dominant positive interaction with `pfs_months`; even the largest interactions will be small in magnitude.

analyses.result_summary: Osimertinib interaction scan: her2_amplification interaction was -0.075 months (p=0.1086).
Osimertinib interaction scan: met_exon14_skipping interaction was -0.061 months (p=0.1830).
Osimertinib interaction scan: pleural_effusion interaction was -0.052 months (p=0.0180).
Osimertinib interaction scan: alk_fusion interaction was 0.044 months (p=0.2175).
Osimertinib interaction scan: ros1_fusion interaction was 0.041 months (p=0.6088).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest clinically coherent patterns in this cohort are a positive `treatment_sotorasib` by `kras_g12c` interaction, positive `albumin_g_dl`, negative `stage_iv`, negative `has_brain_mets`, and negative `weight_loss_pct_6mo`; most other hypothesized treatment-biomarker interactions are near zero.

analyses.result_summary: Final synthesis model: sotorasib by kras_g12c was 2.535 months (p=<1e-300).
Final synthesis model family: albumin_g_dl was a favorable disease-status marker with 0.454 months per 1 g/dL (p=<1e-300).
Final synthesis model family: stage_iv was an adverse disease-status marker with -1.418 months (p=<1e-300).
Final synthesis model family: has_brain_mets was an adverse disease-status marker with -0.917 months (p=<1e-300).
Final synthesis model family: weight_loss_pct_6mo was adverse at -0.365 months per 5 percentage points (p=<1e-300).
